drl:
rule "R0"
when
    accumulate( T1(f1 < -1.5, f3 != true, $s0_0 : f1); $a0_0 : max($s0_0) )
    not T1(f2 == false, f1 < $a0_0)
then
end
rule "R1"
salience -1
when
    $p1_0 : T1(f1 not in (-1000000007, 1), f3 == true)
then
    delete($p1_0);
end
rule "R2"
when
    $p2_0 : T1(f2 == true, f3 == true)
then
    delete($p2_0);
end
rule "R3"
when
    ( $p3_0 : T0(f2 == false) )
    or
    ( $p3_0 : T0(f2 == false) )
then
    insertLogical(new T1($p3_0.getF0(), $p3_0.getF0(), $p3_0.isF1(), $p3_0.isF1()));
    insertLogical(new T1(-1000000007, -5, true, true));
    $p3_0.setF2(true);
    update($p3_0);
end
rule "R4"
salience -2
when
    $p4_0 : T0($b4_0_0 : f1, $b4_0_1 : f2)
    $p4_1 : T0(f1 != true, f0 > -1, $b4_1_0 : f2)
then
    insertLogical(new T1(2, $p4_1.getF0(), $b4_0_1, $p4_0.isF2()));
    insertLogical(new T1(-1, $p4_1.getF0(), false, true));
end
rule "R5"
when
    T0(f1 != true, f0 > 2.5, $b5_0_0 : f0, $b5_0_1 : f2)
    not T1(f2 in (true, false), f3 != true, f1 != $b5_0_0)
    accumulate( T1(f3 == true, f2 == $b5_0_1, $s5_2 : f0); $a5_2 : min($s5_2) )
then
end
